title: Craft-Payne
description: Adds the time control and movement from Max Payne into Minecraft.
body:
# Craft-payne
(no icon yet **¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯**)

A proof-of-concept mod that messes with the new `tick` systems added in 1.20.3.


This mod adds the **bullet-time** and dodging mechanics from Max-Payne, which goes well with gun mods.
Going into bullet time **will slow down time for every player**, so this **may/may not be viable in multiplayer** situations.

Bullet time by default is controlled by "Z" and "X", and can be bound to other keys.

Bullet time *should* work server-side (meaning everyone has their time correctly slowed down), but in order to activate bullet-time at-will, you must have this mod installed.

If you have any questions, feel free to ask them on the issue tracker.
